local function safe_sub(str, start, finish)
 local s = string.sub(str, start, math.min(finish, #str))
 return s ~= "" and s or "00"
end
local function format_time(time_str)
 local hour = safe_sub(time_str, 1, 2)
 local minute = safe_sub(time_str, 3, 4)
 local second = safe_sub(time_str, 5, 6)
 return string.format('%02d:%02d:%02d', hour, minute, second)
end
local function format_date(date_str)
 local year = safe_sub(date_str, 1, 4)
 local month = safe_sub(date_str, 5, 6)
 local day = safe_sub(date_str, 7, 8)
 return string.format('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)
end
local function format_iso8601(date_str, time_str)
 return format_date(date_str) .. 'T' .. format_time(time_str) .. '.00000Z'
end
return format_iso8601(wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.DATUM, wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.TIME

local function safe_sub(str, start, finish)
 local s = string.sub(str, start, math.min(finish, #str))
 return s ~= "" and s or "00"
end

DATUM = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.DATUM
TIME = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.TIME

year = safe_sub(DATUM, 1, 4)
month = safe_sub(DATUM, 5, 6)
day = safe_sub(DATUM, 7, 8)
hour = safe_sub(TIME, 1, 2)
minute = safe_sub(TIME, 3, 4)
second = safe_sub(TIME, 5, 6)

iso_date = string.format(
 '%s-%s-%sT%s:%s:%s.00000Z',
 year, month, day,
 hour, minute, second
)

return iso_date

  if type(arr)~="table"then return arr end
  for _,obj in ipairs(arr)do
    if type(obj)=="table"and obj.items then obj.items=ensureArray(obj.items)end
  end
  return arr
end
return ensureItems(wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES)

function ensureArray(t)
  if type(t) ~= "table" then return {t} end
  local isArray = true
  for k, v in pairs(t) do
    if type(k) ~= "number" or math.floor(k) ~= k then
      isArray = false
      break
    end
  end
  return isArray and t or {t}
end

function ensureAllItemsAreArrays(objectsArray)
  if type(objectsArray) ~= "table" then return objectsArray end
  for _, obj in ipairs(objectsArray) do
    if type(obj) == "table" and obj.items then
      obj.items = ensureArray(obj.items)
    end
  end
  return objectsArray
end

return ensureAllItemsAreArrays(wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES)
